title: Crispy Vegan Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy vegan stir fry recipe with crispy texture, using cabbage and a variety of vegetables.

ingredients.name: Fry Sauce
ingredients.notes: make sure to check ingredients for vegan status

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the cabbage and Russian cabbage to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until tender.
Prepare the fry sauce according to package instructions.
Add the cooked cabbage mixture to a large bowl with the cooked rice, crispy noodles, and fry sauce. Mix until well combined.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
